title: TEKXYZ Reflex Ball with Counter App & Online Community, 2 Difficulty Levels Boxing Ball with Headband, Perfect for Reaction, Agility, Punching Speed, Fight Skill & Hand Eye Coordination Training
features: GROW WITH TekXYZ APP – Track hits, learn skills, join global challenges, make new friends, and stay motivated with the immersive mobile game experience

TWO DIFFICULTY LEVELS - The Novices ball is slightly softer, and the string connect to it is much thinner to help beginners easy to learn, whereas the bungee on the Veterans ball has a lot more spring, making it moves faster and less predictably

THREE VERSIONS - We have three versions, Black/Red, Pink/Red, and Yellow/Red. They are all packed in a lovely gradient color lid and base box. The black, pink, and yellow balls are soft and of low speed, as they are for beginners
AN ADDICTIVE WORKOUT - Just search the keywords "addictive" in the review section and you will know it. Here is a example: "The time flys by and you don't realize how much you've been training"

A FUNNY GIFT - In the beginning, watching your loved ones working hard as a cat but NOT being able to hit the ball is quite funny. And then it becomes an entertaining competition once there's someone get the hang of it

TekXYZ Boxing Reflex Ball Talents Showcase Amazon Merchant video Where can I download and how do I use the TekXYZ App? 1. Download. Scan the code ON the box or search “TekXYZ” in the App Store or Google Play to download the App. 2. Sign up in the App. 3. Activate. Use the App to scan the App Access Pass INSIDE the box for activation. Is the TekXYZ App free? Yes. Each purchase includes a free 1-year membership. After that, features like reward events and the 1-on-1 battle mode require a subscription, but core features like sharing and solo training remain free. For updates, visit tekxyz.com
